# updateOutputMasterPlug

**Instance Property**

Updates the value of the primary output plug (simulating a lock transaction).

## Declaration

```swift
IOReturn (*updateOutputMasterPlug)(void *self, UInt32 oldVal, UInt32 newVal);
```

## Parameters

- **self**: Pointer to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/iokit/iofirewireavclibprotocolinterface].
- **oldVal**: Value returned by [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/iokit/iofirewireavclibprotocolinterface/1508810-readoutputmasterplug].
- **newVal**: New value to store in plug if its current value is `oldVal`.
title: updateOutputMasterPlug
